name: Snake
description: Infrared thermal imaging intelligence — pit organs detect temperature differences of 0.003°C, creating a thermal map overlaid on visual input. Two separate sensory worlds merged into a single hunting model. Jacobson's organ chemical analysis tastes air molecules with forked tongue stereoscopy. Rectilinear locomotion, lateral undulation, sidewinding, and concertina — four movement algorithms selected by terrain geometry. Limbless intelligence that sees heat.

core_attributes.neurology: pit organ IR neurons, Jacobson's organ chemosensory, multi-mode locomotion CPG
core_attributes.pattern: infrared thermal imaging, chemical stereoscopy, terrain-adaptive locomotion
